_comment: Runtime security hooks (kiteguard-style) — scaffolded by javi-forge

PreToolUse.hook:
COMMAND="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"
BLOCKED_PATTERNS=(
  'rm -rf /'
  'rm -rf ~'
  'chmod 777'
  'curl.*|.*sh'
  'wget.*|.*sh'
  'eval.*\$'
  'base64.*-d.*|.*sh'
  ':(){:|:&};:'
)
for pattern in "${BLOCKED_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
  if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE "$pattern"; then
    echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command pattern detected: $pattern"
    exit 2
  fi
done
exit 0
PreToolUse.description: Block dangerous shell commands (rm -rf /, chmod 777, pipe-to-sh, fork bombs)

PreToolUse.hook:
COMMAND="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"
SENSITIVE_PATHS=(
  '.env'
  '.env.local'
  '.env.production'
  'credentials'
  'secrets'
  '.ssh'
  '.gnupg'
  '.aws/credentials'
)
for path in "${SENSITIVE_PATHS[@]}"; do
  if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE "(cat|less|head|tail|bat|read).*$path"; then
    echo "BLOCKED: Attempt to read sensitive file: $path"
    exit 2
  fi
done
exit 0
PreToolUse.description: Prevent reading sensitive files (.env, credentials, SSH keys)

PreToolUse.hook:
INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"
PROTECTED_FILES=(
  '.env'
  '.env.production'
  'credentials.json'
  'serviceAccountKey.json'
  '.ssh/'
  '.gnupg/'
)
for pf in "${PROTECTED_FILES[@]}"; do
  if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "$pf"; then
    echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify protected file: $pf"
    exit 2
  fi
done
exit 0
PreToolUse.description: Prevent writing to credential and secret files

PostToolUse.hook:
OUTPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT"
LEAK_PATTERNS=(
  'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}'
  'ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36}'
  'sk_live_[0-9a-zA-Z]{24,}'
  'xox[baprs]-[0-9a-zA-Z-]+'
  '-----BEGIN.*PRIVATE KEY-----'
)
for pattern in "${LEAK_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
  if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -qE "$pattern"; then
    echo "WARNING: Command output may contain secrets. Review carefully."
    exit 0
  fi
done
exit 0
PostToolUse.description: Warn if command output contains potential secrets
